chart_type: 3-color scatter + 3 dashed/solid/dotted fit lines in same colors
method: Scatter preserved from prior extraction. New curve pass: per-column HSV color-mask median row for each of blue / green / red, with scatter markers masked out (radius 7 px) and a wide legend-swatch exclusion at cols ≥700.
known_undercount: 24°C blue markers stacked on the dashed blue fit line still classify as dash fragments; visual match achieved (3 IF curves visible) but scatter-count gap persists pending a relaxed dash-fragment filter (blue erode_kernel 4→2, aspect_ratio_max 2.5→3.5).
phase4_match: visual: yes (3 IF curves rendered with dash/solid/dot styles, no phantom green); meta-gate: no (24°C scatter undercount unaddressed).
